title: Sharing conditional colouring via multiple users
excerpt: I’ve added conditional colouring to a board so that any past dates change colour. Is there any way all board members can inherit this without having to set it up themselves?

posts.author: jarradwil (Jarrad Williamson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve added conditional colouring to a board so that any past dates change colour. Is there any way all board members can inherit this without having to set it up themselves?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @jarradwil! Conditional coloring should show up for every person who can see the board. That being said, if people wanted to create their own boards, they would have to recreate the conditional coloring.
